summary: FR-SYNC-05 A: backend-only one-shot read-only Gmail cancellation-cost sync. Deterministic extractor (extractGmailCostEvidence) for KRW cancel fee + refund cutoff with keyword-adjacency, purchase-total negative guard, year inference (Dec/Jan boundary) and leap-year validation; events repo findGmailCostCandidateEvents (imminent external GCal, still-empty) + applyGmailCostEvidence (per-field guarded UPDATE preserving nonzero money/non-null cutoff, idempotent); gmail.readonly auth + GmailClient adapter; runGmailCostSync orchestration (generic-title skip, deterministic id ordering, abort-without-partial-write on API error); env resolvers + gmail:auth/gmail:cost-sync scripts; docs/codebase-map.md updated. No migration, route, UI, cron, send, webhook, or LLM. Committed e0a4c17.
